/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/heat_mpi.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_mpi.dir/src/solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_mpi.dir/src/solver_mpi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_mpi.dir/src/grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_mpi.dir/src/boundary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_mpi.dir/src/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat_mpi.dir/src/config.cpp.o -o bin/heat_mpi  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi_cxx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/openmpi/lib/libmpi.so
